displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #13: Day of the Dragon Lords!
synopsis: On the water world of Drexel, Luke Skywalker decides to join Governor Quarg's group in their battle against the Dragon Lords, at least for now. Aboard Crimson Jack's space cruiser, Han Solo is talking his way out of trouble when Jack and his crew realize they have been duped into coming to Drexel. Quarg's surface jamming equipment disrupts the cruiser, giving Solo, Chewbacca, and Princess Leia Organa the chance to flee in the *Millennium Falcon*. The *Falcon* splashes down amid an epic battle between Quarg's hydra-craft pilots and the Dragon Lords, and one hydra craft attacks the ship just as its occupants climb out. Luke, piloting a hydra craft himself, turns on his new comrades to save the fallen Rebels. He finds only Chewbacca, who, believing Luke responsible for the attack, is enraged at the young Rebel.
title: Star Wars (1977) #13: Day of the Dragon Lords!
